items.title_en: Alphabet is falling on a big spending forecast increase. What analysts are saying
items.title_zh: Alphabet 因支出预测大幅增加而下跌。分析师怎么说
items.desc_en: Some shops on the Street lowered their price targets for Alphabet following the Google parent's second-quarter results.
items.desc_zh: 在谷歌母公司公布第二季度业绩后，华尔街的一些商店降低了 Alphabet 的目标价格。

items.title_en: Trump says Saudi nuclear deal does not include enrichment, Riyadh must join Abraham Accords
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示沙特核协议不包括浓缩，利雅得必须加入亚伯拉罕协议
items.desc_en: "There will be no enrichment of material!" the president said in a Truth Social post.
items.desc_zh: “物质不会丰富！”总统在《真相社会》帖子中说道。

items.title_en: American Airlines slashes 2026 earnings outlook as fuel costs spike
items.title_zh: 由于燃油成本飙升，美国航空大幅下调 2026 年盈利预期
items.desc_en: American Airlines further cut its 2026 earnings outlook, citing higher fuel costs.
items.desc_zh: 美国航空以燃油成本上涨为由​​，进一步下调了 2026 年盈利预期。

items.title_en: China's Geely to make EVs at Ford plant in Spain under new joint venture
items.title_zh: 中国吉利将通过新合资企业在西班牙福特工厂生产电动汽车
items.desc_en: Ford and Geely plan for the joint venture will begin operations in the first half of 2027, with the first new vehicles scheduled to roll off the line in 2028.
items.desc_zh: 福特和吉利的合资公司计划于 2027 年上半年开始运营，首批新车计划于 2028 年下线。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Lockheed Martin, Tesla, Alphabet & more

items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: 'Let's enjoy the ride' says Elon Musk, as AI fears mount
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能的恐惧加剧，埃隆·马斯克说：“让我们享受这段旅程吧”
items.desc_en: Talking to The Economist, Musk said he doesn't care if people hate him and said he was not a racist.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克在接受《经济学人》采访时表示，他不在乎人们是否讨厌他，并表示他不是种族主义者。

items.desc_en: Comcast said earlier this year it would split the cable businesses from the media business, creating two separate publicly traded companies.
items.desc_zh: 康卡斯特今年早些时候表示，它将把有线电视业务从媒体业务中剥离出来，创建两家独立的上市公司。

items.title_en: Moonshot AI accessed Nvidia's chips despite Chinese export ban, White House official says

items.desc_en: A White House official said Moonshot AI, which released the powerful Kimi K3 model last week, accessed Nvidia's GB300 chips in Thailand.
items.desc_zh: 一位白宫官员表示，Moonshot AI 上周发布了功能强大的 Kimi K3 型号，在泰国使用了 Nvidia 的 GB300 芯片。

items.title_en: Mamdani backs off pledge to arrest Netanyahu citing lack of authority
items.title_zh: 马姆达尼以缺乏权威为由放弃逮捕内塔尼亚胡的承诺
items.desc_en: The New York City mayor instead called on US authorities to act on International Criminal Court's arrest warrant against the Israeli prime minister.
items.desc_zh: 相反，纽约市市长呼吁美国当局根据国际刑事法院对以色列总理的逮捕令采取行动。

items.title_en: Two Russians handed down jail terms for terrorism and spying in Angola
items.title_zh: 两名俄罗斯人因在安哥拉从事恐怖主义和间谍活动而被判入狱
items.desc_en: The two, a political consultant and a translator, denied allegations of fomenting protests last year.
items.desc_zh: 两人分别是一名政治顾问和一名翻译，否认了去年煽动抗议活动的指控。

items.title_en: Wispro
items.title_zh: Wispro
items.desc_en: Stop typing, start talking, get perfectly written text
items.desc_zh: 停止打字，开始说话，获得完美的书写文本

items.title_en: Wreckage of Pan Am plane that shaped aviation safety found 74 years on
items.title_zh: 74 年前影响航空安全的泛美航空飞机残骸被发现
items.desc_en: The deaths of 52 people on the Clipper Endeavor led to the introduction of mandatory pre-flight safety briefings.
items.desc_zh: 奋进号快船 52 人死亡导致强制飞行前安全简报的出台。

items.title_en: Mufal
items.title_zh: Mufal
items.desc_en: Undetectable AI copilot for live meetings
items.desc_zh: 实时会议的不可察觉的人工智能副驾驶

items.title_en: Rechroma
items.title_zh: Rechroma
items.desc_en: Build better color palettes. Ship complete color systems.
items.desc_zh: 构建更好的调色板。交付完整的色彩系统。

items.title_en: US to announce deal allowing Saudi Arabia a nuclear programme
items.title_zh: 美国将宣布允许沙特阿拉伯实施核计划的协议
items.desc_en: The agreement would fulfil a long-held Saudi ambition but could attract concern in Israel and from some US lawmakers.
items.desc_zh: 该协议将实现沙特长期以来的野心，但可能引起以色列和一些美国立法者的担忧。

items.title_en: Tankers make sharp U-turns after Houthi shipping threat
items.title_zh: 胡塞武装航运威胁后油轮急转
items.desc_en: All of the ships were travelling to or from Saudi ports before changing course, ship-tracking data shows.
items.desc_zh: 船舶跟踪数据显示，所有船舶在改变航线之前都曾往返于沙特港口。

items.title_en: British woman jailed for blackmail after accusing banker of rape in Hong Kong
items.title_zh: 英国女子在香港指控银行家强奸后因敲诈勒索而入狱
items.desc_en: Isabel Rose was convicted of trying to extort £100,000 from the UK banker and perverting the course of justice.
items.desc_zh: 伊莎贝尔·罗斯因试图向英国银行家勒索 10 万英镑并妨碍司法公正而被定罪。

items.title_en: GTA DataCity
items.title_zh: GTA DataCity
items.desc_en: San Francisco co-working dataset visualized, as a game!
items.desc_zh: 旧金山联合办公数据集可视化，作为游戏！

items.title_en: OpenAI says its AI went rogue and launched 'unprecedented' cyber-attack
items.title_zh: OpenAI 称其人工智能失控并发起“前所未有”的网络攻击
items.desc_en: It is one of the first publicly disclosed cyber-attacks carried out by AI without direct human involvement.
items.desc_zh: 这是首次公开披露的由人工智能在没有人类直接参与的情况下实施的网络攻击之一。

items.title_en: AgentLoop
items.title_zh: AgentLoop
items.desc_en: Starts a fresh Codex worker and critic every cycle
items.desc_zh: 每个周期启动一名新的法典工作人员和批评家

items.title_en: SMASH Voice to Invoice
items.title_zh: SMASH Voice to Invoice
items.desc_en: Build and send quotes as fast as you can talk
items.desc_zh: 尽可能快地构建和发送报价

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Dogs have a great sense of smell. Now machines are being trained to sniff out odours.
items.desc_zh: 狗有很强的嗅觉。现在机器正在接受训练来嗅出气味。

items.title_en: LapuAi
items.title_zh: LapuAi
items.desc_en: OS Driver for AI to use computers
items.desc_zh: AI使用计算机的操作系统驱动程序

items.title_en: Motionly
items.title_zh: Motionly
items.desc_en: AI-native motion graphics editor
items.desc_zh: AI原生动态图形编辑器

items.title_en: AI minister role boosted but tech department axed in Burnham shake-up
items.title_zh: 伯纳姆改组中人工智能部长职位得到提升，但技术部门被削减
items.desc_en: Kanishka Narayan will attend cabinet - but no longer have the leadership of a technology secretary.
items.desc_zh: 卡尼什卡·纳拉扬 (Kanishka Narayan) 将出席内阁会议，但不再拥有技术部长的领导权。

items.title_en: HonorBox
items.title_zh: HonorBox
items.desc_en: Sell digital products with just Stripe and GitHub
items.desc_zh: 仅使用 Stripe 和 GitHub 销售数字产品

items.title_en: Thousands of websites taken down for illegal World Cup streams
items.title_zh: 数千个因非法世界杯直播而被关闭的网站
items.desc_en: More than 1,000 illegal streaming sites were shut down in the US during the tournament, with a similar amount blocked in Colombia.
items.desc_zh: 比赛期间，美国关闭了 1,000 多个非法流媒体网站，哥伦比亚也屏蔽了类似数量的网站。

items.title_en: Ofcom unable to take further legal action against suicide forum
items.title_zh: Ofcom 无法对自杀论坛采取进一步的法律行动
items.desc_en: The regulator said it had "no further legal routes available" under the Online Safety Act.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，根据《在线安全法》，“没有其他可用的合法途径”。

items.title_en: AliExpress fined record €550m by EU for allowing sale of illegal goods
items.title_zh: 全球速卖通因允许销售非法商品而被欧盟罚款创纪录的 5.5 亿欧元
items.desc_en: The Chinese retailer allowed unsafe toys and counterfeit clothes to be sold on its site, says the EU.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟表示，这家中国零售商允许在其网站上销售不安全的玩具和假冒服装。

items.title_en: Cosyra 2.0
items.title_zh: Cosyra 2.0
items.desc_en: A cloud workspace for coding agents from your phone
items.desc_zh: 通过手机为编码代理提供云工作空间

items.title_en: Moxie Docs: Knowledgebases
items.title_zh: Moxie Docs: Knowledgebases
items.desc_en: Automated documentation for developers, users, and AI Tools
items.desc_zh: 面向开发人员、用户和 AI 工具的自动化文档

items.title_en: PromptQL
items.title_zh: PromptQL
items.desc_en: Multiplayer AI that replaces Slack
items.desc_zh: 取代 Slack 的多人 AI

items.title_en: China's Moonshot AI claims Kimi K3 can rival OpenAI and Anthropic
items.title_zh: 中国的Moonshot AI声称Kimi K3可以与OpenAI和Anthropic相媲美
items.desc_en: The company has unveiled a massive new artificial intelligence model it says can take on top American firms.
items.desc_zh: 该公司推出了一个大规模的新人工智能模型，据称可以与美国顶尖公司抗衡。

items.title_en: Trump Media to sell early access to key social posts
items.title_zh: 特朗普媒体将出售对关键社交帖子的早期访问权
items.desc_en: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed of the its social posts for Wall Street traders.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普媒体正在为华尔街交易员推出快速、付费的社交帖子。

items.title_en: Teen hackers who live streamed cyber-attack on TfL jailed
items.title_zh: 直播伦敦交通局网络攻击的青少年黑客被判入狱
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: Basement
items.title_zh: Basement
items.desc_en: Shopping browser with agentic checkout
items.desc_zh: 具有代理结账功能的购物浏览器

items.title_en: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
items.title_zh: TikTok 因儿童年龄检查面临 Ofcom 调查
items.desc_en: It follows a review by the regulator in May that criticised the platform for not being "safe enough" for children.
items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。

items.title_en: Megaphone
items.title_zh: Megaphone
items.desc_en: Open-source Mac dictation App that's 100% on-device
items.desc_zh: 100% 设备内置的开源 Mac 听写应用程序

items.title_en: SpaceX share price drops below stock market debut
items.title_zh: SpaceX 股价跌破上市首日价
items.desc_en: Share trading in Elon Musk’s rocket company has been volatile since it went public a month ago.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克的火箭公司自一个月前上市以来，其股票交易一直波动较大。

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Surgeons remotely control two human-like robots in an operating theatre.
items.desc_zh: 外科医生在手术室中远程控制两个类人机器人。

items.desc_en: AI automation agent to get stuff done across apps or browser

items.desc_zh: 您的人工智能双胞胎托管您的视频播客
